_comment: Base confidence scores per source. These are starting weights. A field found in multiple sources gets a boosted score calculated in confidence_calculator.py.
_comment2: Boost applied per additional source that confirms the same value. E.g. if Java appears in Resume (0.95) and GitHub (0.75), the final confidence is capped at 0.99.
_comment3: Field weights used when calculating overall_confidence. Fields that matter more to recruiters get a higher weight.
